approved_command_preview: Retry PR #312 dcoir-review fix execution using the already staged guarded 002 script, but with PowerShell native-command stderr tolerated and a quiet main checkout restore so harmless git status text does not fail the wrapper. It preserves the same PR head/blob verification, two-file patch scope, local validation, PR branch push, and no external @codex request/no ready-for-review behavior.
